name: Spicy Mini-Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Shape the mixture into balls about 1 inch in diameter.
3. Place the meatballs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-15 minutes, turning once halfway through the cooking time.
5. Serve with wooden picks.
